summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlideQuantum Labs cinematic agency website. All backend APIs (100% success) and frontend components (95% success) working correctly. Contact form integration, navigation, and WhatsApp links functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Toast notifications not consistently appearing after form submission

integration_issues.issue: Mobile menu toggle has element stability issues during click (animation interference)

passed_tests: All 5 backend API endpoints working (GET /api/, POST /api/contact, GET /api/contacts, GET /api/config, PUT /api/config)
Hero section renders with animated text, particle effects, orbit rings, and CTA buttons
Navbar floating glass pill with all nav links and Let's Talk CTA working
Navigation scroll functionality - all nav links scroll to correct sections
Industries section shows 18 industry cards in horizontal scroll layout (exceeds 12+ requirement)
Services bento grid shows 10 service cards correctly
Process timeline shows all 5 steps correctly
Why Choose Us section shows 6 trust cards and 4 stats
Contact form submission works and stores data via POST /api/contact
WhatsApp links open correctly with pre-filled message (wa.me/919032247068)
Footer renders with company info and navigation links
CTA band section renders with 'Ready to Automate?' heading
Marquee band shows scrolling service keywords
All required data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
